title: centaurium grandiflorum subsp. boissieri
intro: Centaurium grandiflorum subsp. boissieri, also known as Boissier's centaury or centaury, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Boissier's centaury include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Boissier's centaury is often prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
